children.heading: Commercial law program
children.label: a Commercial law program
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary of Commerce to carry out the program described in such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 2001, and each fiscal year thereafter.section 6981(a) of this title

children.heading: Labor law program
children.label: b Labor law program
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary of Labor to carry out the program described in such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 2001, and each fiscal year thereafter.section 6981(b) of this title

children.heading: Legal system and civil society rule of law program
children.label: c Legal system and civil society rule of law program
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary of State to carry out the program described in such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 2001, and each fiscal year thereafter.section 6981(c) of this title

children.heading: Construction with other laws
children.label: d Construction with other laws
children.text: Except as provided in this chapter, funds may be made available to carry out the purposes of this part notwithstanding any other provision of law.
